llm_advice.rationale: Baseline shows bottleneck from multiple kernel launches for rank-16 path. Fusing B.T@X, A@(result), and addition to W@X into a single custom kernel reduces launch overhead and improves memory locality, while keeping the large W@X GEMM on cuBLAS for optimal performance.

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
